behaviors.description: Embedding output dimensionality matches the vector index dimension for a query.
behaviors.justification: The failure is at the contract boundary between embedding generation and vector-index schema; a pure unit test of one function can miss miswired model/index configuration.
behaviors.test_description: Run an integration test that wires the real embedding client module (or configured model wrapper) to the vector-index metadata/config and asserts produced vector length equals index dimension before insert/search.

behaviors.description: Similarity search returns results in descending cosine similarity.
behaviors.justification: This behavior is about retrieval-module interaction with scoring/search configuration, not just a standalone sort helper. A unit test could miss wrong metric/index/query wiring.
behaviors.test_description: Seed a test vector index with known vectors, execute similarity search through the repository/search module, and assert returned scores are monotonically non-increasing and IDs match expected nearest neighbors.

behaviors.description: LLM reranking changes order for nuanced-intent queries compared to raw similarity ranking.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real LLM judgment for nuanced intent; mocking would hide the exact failure this behavior targets.
behaviors.test_description: Use a fixed nuanced query and candidate set, call the real reranker model, and assert at least one position differs from raw similarity order across repeated runs with an acceptance threshold (e.g., reorder occurs in >=X% runs).

behaviors.description: No-close-match queries return empty results, not low-relevance noise.
behaviors.justification: The failure appears when similarity scores, threshold policy, and API response shaping interact. Unit-only threshold logic tests can miss boundary wiring/config errors.
behaviors.test_description: Populate index with unrelated products, run search through API/service stack for out-of-domain queries, and assert zero results when best score is below configured cutoff.

behaviors.description: Median end-to-end query latency (embed + search + rerank + response) stays under 2 seconds.
behaviors.justification: This is a full pipeline SLO spanning multiple model-backed steps and retrieval; lower-level tests cannot expose compounded latency across the real sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Execute a representative workload through the full deployed pipeline with real embedding and reranking calls, collect end-to-end timings, and assert median latency is <2.0s under controlled load.
